title: Public NIPT dataset (preprocessed BED files)
author: Sun, Kun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Processed data for Karolinska and Chandrananda datasets.  
 
 This package contains the processed data (in BED format) for  Karolinska  and  Chandrananda  datasets. 
 
 The raw reads were first preprocessed using Ktrim software to remove adaptors and low-quality cycles, 
 and then aligned to the NCBI GRCh38 genome using Bowtie2 software. PCR duplicates were recognized and 
 removed. An implementation is available at  https://github.com/hellosunking/STAR-Protocol-cfDNA-end-selection .
